sentences.text: The Zihpm extension comprises up to 29 additional unprivileged 64-bit hardware performance counters, `hpmcounter3-hpmcounter31`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: When XLEN=32, the upper 32 bits of these performance counters are accessible via additional CSRs `hpmcounter3h- hpmcounter31h`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: The Zihpm extension depends on the Zicsr extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: The implemented number and width of these additional counters, and the set of events they count, are platform-specific.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: Accessing an unimplemented counter may cause an illegal-instruction exception or may return a constant value.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: If the configuration used to select the events counted by a counter is misconfigured, the counter may return a constant value.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters

sentences.text: The execution environment should provide a means to determine the number and width of the implemented counters, and an interface to configure the events to be counted by each counter.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zihpm" Extension for Hardware Performance Counters
